# terrible_community_general_pagerduty_user (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `access_token` (String) An API access token to authenticate with the PagerDuty REST API.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `pd_email` (String) The user's email address. `pd_email` is the unique identifier used and cannot be updated using this module.
- `pd_user` (String) Name of the user in PagerDuty.

### Optional

- `pd_role` (String) The user's role.
- `pd_teams` (String) The teams to which the user belongs. Required if `state=present`.
- `state` (String) State of the user. On `present`, it creates a user if the user does not exist. On `absent`, it removes a user if the account exists.
